message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, Zap, Star } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator Secret Units: Complete Unlock Guide 2026",
  description: "Master the art of obtaining anime tactical simulator secret units. Learn summoning rates, evolution paths, and Tower Mode strategies for 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Secret+Units+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Secret Units** are the rarest and most powerful fighters in Anime Tactical Simulator, essential for World 4 and beyond.
- **Unlock Methods** include low-rate summoning (approx. 0.01%), high-level evolution, and reaching **Tower Floor 100**.
- **Tower Progression** is mandatory as it provides additional unit slots, drastically increasing your team's total DPS.
- **Resource Management** suggests saving your Gems for Mythic and Secret summons rather than early-game traits.
- **Evolution** requires duplicate units and Souls, which are obtained by selling units of the same rarity.
</Callout>

Anime Tactical Simulator has quickly become a standout title in the Roblox strategy genre, challenging players to assemble the ultimate team of fighters. To truly dominate the leaderboards and clear high-difficulty raids, obtaining **anime tactical simulator secret units** is your primary objective. These units offer significantly higher base stats and unique abilities that outclass even the strongest Mythic fighters. In this comprehensive guide, we will explore every reliable method to secure these elusive powerhouses, from optimizing your summoning luck to conquering the 100-floor Tower Mode. Whether you are a new player starting in World 1 or a veteran pushing through World 4, understanding how to manage your **anime tactical simulator secret units** is the difference between stagnation and total world conquest.

<Section icon={Star} title="Understanding Unit Rarities and Secret Drop Rates">

Before diving into the hunt, you must understand where **anime tactical simulator secret units** stand in the game's hierarchy. The power gap between a Legendary and a Secret unit is massive, often determining whether you can clear a boss in seconds or minutes.

**Video Highlights:**
- Overview of the latest Secret units like Sunju.
- Demonstrating the power difference in World 4 raids.
- Tips on managing early-game Yen for better summons.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="kdaFQ1mKiFI" title="Anime Tactical Simulator Secret Units Showcase" />

Summoning is the most common way to acquire units, but it requires patience and significant Yen investment. While Common and Rare units are used primarily as fodder for leveling, Secret units are the ultimate "jackpot" of the card system.

| Rarity | Drop Chance (Estimated) | Primary Use | Evolution Potential |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Common** | 60% - 70% | Fodder / Leveling | None |
| **Rare** | 20% - 25% | Early game / Fodder | Low |
| **Legendary** | 3% - 5% | Mid-game core | Moderate |
| **Mythic** | 0.5% - 1% | Late-game baseline | High |
| **Secret** | **< 0.05%** | **End-game carry** | **Maximum** |

<Callout type="warning" title="Summoning Strategy">
Never spend your Gems on basic unit summons in the early game. Focus on using Yen for card packs and save your Gems for "Premium Rerolls" or high-tier talent adjustments once you actually land a Secret unit.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="How to Obtain Secret Units: The Three Main Paths">

There is no single "magic button" to get **anime tactical simulator secret units**, but there are three distinct paths you can follow depending on your current progression level and resource availability.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="The Summoner's Path">
    - **Method**: Opening card packs in the lobby or specific worlds.
    - **Pros**: Accessible from World 1.
    - **Cons**: Extremely low rates; requires millions of Yen.
  </Card>
  <Card title="The Tower Conqueror">
    - **Method**: Reaching Floor 100 in Tower Mode.
    - **Pros**: Guaranteed Secret unit reward.
    - **Cons**: Requires a full Mythic team and high levels.
  </Card>
  <Card title="The Evolution Specialist">
    - **Method**: Using duplicates and Souls to upgrade Mythics.
    - **Pros**: More predictable than summoning.
    - **Cons**: Requires massive amounts of fodder and Souls.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

To maximize your efficiency, you should be pushing all three paths simultaneously. Use your excess Yen to summon while your units are AFK-farming, and use your active playtime to push Tower floors.

| Method | Resource Needed | Difficulty | Reliability |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Card Packs** | Yen / Gems | Low | Very Low |
| **Tower Floor 100** | High-level Team | Very High | **Guaranteed** |
| **Unit Evolution** | Souls / Duplicates | High | High |
| **Special Events** | Event Tokens | Medium | Moderate |

<Callout type="tip" title="Luck Multipliers">
Check the shop for "Lucky" gamepasses or use "Luck Potions" before a large summoning session. While they don't guarantee a Secret unit, they significantly improve your odds of hitting the Mythic tier, which can later be evolved into a Secret.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Tower Mode: The Guaranteed Route to Power">

Tower Mode is arguably the most important feature for anyone hunting **anime tactical simulator secret units**. Not only does it provide a guaranteed Secret unit at Floor 100, but it also unlocks the unit slots necessary to use them effectively.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Build a Mythic Foundation">
    You cannot clear the Tower with Legendaries alone. Aim for a team including units like Demon Brother or Flame Master leveled to at least 50.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Push Milestone Floors">
    Focus on reaching Floors 10, 25, 50, and 100. Each of these milestones provides a permanent +1 unit slot for your team.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Optimize VFX and Lag">
    High Tower floors feature many enemies. Turn off "Ability VFX" in settings to prevent frame drops that can lead to a loss.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Claim the Secret Unit">
    Upon clearing Floor 100, you will receive a Secret unit. This unit will likely become the strongest member of your squad immediately.
  </Step>
</Steps>

| Tower Floor | Reward | Impact on Gameplay |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Floor 10** | +1 Unit Slot | 33% DPS Increase |
| **Floor 25** | +1 Unit Slot | 25% DPS Increase |
| **Floor 50** | +1 Unit Slot / Rare Items | Massive Stat Boost |
| **Floor 75** | Exclusive Unit / Gems | High Utility |
| **Floor 100** | **Secret Unit / +1 Slot** | **End-game Readiness** |

<Callout type="success" title="Milestone Priority">
Even if you can't reach Floor 100 yet, getting to Floor 25 is mandatory. Having 5 units equipped instead of 3 is a game-changer for farming the Yen needed for more summons.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Zap} title="Evolution and Soul Management">

If your luck with card packs is poor, evolution is your best friend. Evolution allows you to turn high-tier Mythic units into **anime tactical simulator secret units** by consuming resources gathered from throughout the game.

To evolve a unit, you generally need:
1.  **Duplicate Units**: Multiple copies of the same unit you wish to evolve.
2.  **Souls**: Obtained by selling units of the same rarity. To get Mythic Souls, you must sell Mythic units.
3.  **Evolution Stones**: Rare drops found in high-level raids and dungeons.

| Material | How to Obtain | Usage |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Mythic Souls** | Selling Mythic Units | Required for Secret Evolution |
| **Legendary Souls** | Selling Legendary Units | Required for Mythic Evolution |
| **Stat Cubes** | Raid Rewards | Upgrading Unit Talents |
| **Dungeon Keys** | Codes / Daily Rewards | Accessing Evolution Materials |

<Callout type="info" title="Soul Farming Tip">
Don't sell your Mythics too early! You need a stable team to farm raids. Only sell duplicate Mythics once you have a full team of 6+ high-level units ready to take on World 4 bosses.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="World Progression and Efficiency">

Farming for **anime tactical simulator secret units** requires an immense amount of Yen. To maximize your Yen gain, you must progress through the worlds as quickly as possible, as later worlds offer exponentially higher rewards.

<Checklist
  id="farming-checklist"
  title="Efficiency Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Unlock World 2 to access Stat Upgrades",
    "Reach World 4 for the highest Yen-per-kill ratio",
    "Equip Yen-boost traits on at least one support unit",
    "Clear Daily Missions for free Dungeon Keys",
    "AFK in the highest world possible with Auto-Attack enabled"
  ]}
/>

| World | Unlock Cost | Primary Farming Target | Difficulty Jump |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **World 1** | Free | Basic Yen / Tutorial | None |
| **World 2** | 50k Yen | First Mythics / Stats | Moderate |
| **World 3** | 250k Yen | Raid Materials | High |
| **World 4** | 1M Yen | **Secret Unit Fodder** | **Extreme** |

<Callout type="warning" title="Boss Grinding">
In World 1 and 2, avoid grinding high-HP bosses if it takes more than 2 minutes to kill them. It is more efficient to farm smaller mobs for Yen until you unlock better units or more slots.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="FAQ: Secret Units Masterclass">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What is the best Secret unit in Anime Tactical Simulator currently?",
    answer: "As of early 2026, units like Sunju and specialized evolution Secrets from World 4 are considered top-tier due to their massive AOE damage and scaling potential."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I get a Secret unit from World 1 card packs?",
    answer: "Yes, but the odds are extremely low (estimated 0.01%). It is generally better to push for Tower Floor 100 or evolve your units once you reach World 3."
  },
  {
    question: "Do I lose my Secret units if I prestige or update the game?",
    answer: "No, units are tied to your account data. Early access data was not reset at launch, and your Secret units remain permanent fixtures of your inventory."
  },
  {
    question: "Are traits important for Secret units?",
    answer: "Absolutely. Once you have a Secret unit, you should use Premium Rerolls to aim for 'Mythic' or 'Godly' traits to maximize their damage output in raids."
  }
]} />

</Section>
